title: Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery
tagline: Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery — heritage city of West Bengal

heroImage.alt: Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery, West Bengal

overview.short: Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery is a European cemetery situated at Chaibasa village, Rangamati tea garden, under Malbazar subdivision of Jalpaiguri district in West Bengal, India.
overview.description: Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery is a European cemetery situated at Chaibasa village, Rangamati tea garden, under Malbazar subdivision of Jalpaiguri district in West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Dam Dim
topPlaces.description: Dam Dim (also referred to as Damdimhat) is a village in the Mal CD blocks in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district, West Bengal, India. It is famous for tea gardens and moist deciduous forests.

topPlaces.name: Gurjangjhora Tea Garden
topPlaces.description: Gurjangjhora Tea Garden (also written as Gurjang Jhora) is a village in the Mal CD block in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Mal Adarsha Bidya Bhaban
topPlaces.description: Mal Adarsha Bidya Bhaban is a co-educational higher secondary school at Malbazar subdivision, in Jalpaiguri district, West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Lower Fagu Tea Garden
topPlaces.description: Lower Fagu Tea Garden is a village in the Gorubathan CD block in the Kalimpong Sadar subdivision of Kalimpong district in West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Odlabari
topPlaces.description: Oodlabari is a census town located in the Malbazar subdivision of Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal. Situated in the foothills of the Himalayas, Oodlabari is surrounded by tea gardens and dense forests.

topPlaces.name: Mal river accident
topPlaces.description: On 5 October 2022 at 8 PM (IST), on the day of Vijaya Dashami, suddenly a flood came in the Mal river in Malbazar, West Bengal, India during the immersion during Durga Puja.

topPlaces.name: Gorubathan (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Gorubathan is a community development block (CD block) that forms an administrative division in the Kalimpong subdivision of the Kalimpong district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Mal (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Mal is a community development block (CD block) that forms an administrative division in the Malbazar subdivision of the Jalpaiguri district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (32 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery?
faq.a: Stays in Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rangamati Tea Estate Cemetery?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dam Dim, Gurjangjhora Tea Garden, Mal Adarsha Bidya Bhaban, Lower Fagu Tea Garden, Odlabari.
